pages.visible: Water is really important for your body.
pages.speech: Water is really important for your body.

pages.visible: It helps keep you healthy and strong, making it easier for your brain to think and your body to move!
pages.speech: It helps keep you healthy and strong, making it easier for your brain to think and your body to move!

pages.visible: Sometimes, we forget to drink enough water.
pages.speech: Sometimes, we forget to drink enough water.

pages.visible: Here are some fun ideas to help you drink more every day:
pages.speech: Here are some fun ideas to help you drink more every day:

pages.visible: Get a water bottle in your favourite colour or with a cool design.
pages.speech: Get a water bottle in your favourite colour or with a cool design.

pages.visible: This makes drinking water more fun!
pages.speech: This makes drinking water more fun!

pages.visible: Try putting slices of orange, strawberries or lemon in your water.
pages.speech: Try putting slices of orange, strawberries or lemon in your water.

pages.visible: It not only tastes great but also looks lovely!
pages.speech: It not only tastes great but also looks lovely!

pages.visible: Ask an adult to remind you to drink water during the day.
pages.speech: Ask an adult to remind you to drink water during the day.

pages.visible: You could also set a timer!
pages.speech: You could also set a timer!

pages.visible: Remember, drinking water helps you feel good, play well, and think clearly.
pages.speech: Remember, drinking water helps you feel good, play well, and think clearly.

pages.visible: Let’s drink enough water every day so we can stay happy and healthy!
pages.speech: Let's drink enough water every day so we can stay happy and healthy!
